residual_risks: The bridge procedure writes prompt/out evidence files during operation, so its read-only claim should continue to mean no source edits, no gate approval, and no reviewer-logic port rather than zero filesystem writes; see .claude/agents/reviewer.md:44-57 and .claude/agents/reviewer.md:89-91.
